title: [Feature Request] Support operation unknown layers
body:
```
$ skopeo inspect "docker://ghcr.io/aquasecurity/trivy-db:latest"
FATA[0002] unsupported image-specific operation on artifact with type "application/vnd.aquasec.trivy.config.v1+json"
```

comments.body: Thanks for your report. This is tracked as #1933.
